name: @aristotle/adapter-sdk
description: Generic adapter contract for AristotleOS. Third parties can ship governed adapters for any transport (Modbus dialects we don't cover, vendor-specific BMS, custom robotics stacks, anything that takes an action and emits something) without modifying this repo. Defines AristotleAdapterTransport, DemonstrationTransport, RecordingTransport, and governThroughAdapter — the same shape every first-party adapter in packages/ already implements, generalized.
